parameters.query: SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(d)) as data FROM decision_memory_log d WHERE archived = false;
SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(p)) as data FROM prompt_library p WHERE is_active = true;
SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) as data FROM task_board t WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';
